name: 13.75" Paper Towel Holder Copper Finish - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Help keep your kitchen neat and organized with this Stainless Steel Paper Towel Holder from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of metal, this freestanding paper towel holder provides easy access to paper towels whenever they're needed. It features a vertical rod with a copper finish and a gold-tone round base, providing a touch of shine and easy placement on any flat surface.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
